lines: +        // Index extended (180°), middle/ring/pinky bent. Should classify as pointing.
-        // Index bend deep enough that curl_ratio enters the click window
-        // (≈ 1.22 at bendDeg=110), other fingers stay curled (cr ≈ 2.0).
+        // Every finger curled including thumb — neither pointing nor openPalm.
+        XCTAssertGreaterThan(openPose.pinchDistance, 0.30, "Unpinched hand should be well above pinch threshold")
